variantDefinitions.B: Major morning loss recovery drag (4–8 period shock, −35% morning prog growth, modest appeal drag)
variantDefinitions.C: Harder quality reset (replacement slot closer to talent/baseline, reduced chemistry carryover)

recommendationRationale: Baseline (A): 84.67% recover, 41.4% exceed, median 0.5y; 95–99 bucket 21.58%. Best-scoring variant E: 74.19% recover, 40.22% exceed, median 2y; 95–99 15.59%; score 65.19. Closest variant needs parameter tuning before shipping.
